'''Ice Mountain''' was a mountain on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It was described as being fairly far away and in an isolated location. Several years before [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]], [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] and the [[Ice Demon]] [[Stagorr]] did [[Skirmish on Endor|battle]] on the slopes of Ice Mountain, resulting in a devastating loss for Stagorr. The Ice Demon was imprisoned within Ice Mountain and was unable to leave. Around 3 ABY, Stagorr summoned the Ewok [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] to Ice Mountain to force Logray into a rematch. The encounter resulted in Stagorr's death, and his frozen form was left firmly implanted within Ice Mountain.

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' (1985) 6]] {{1st}}
